$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: metadataGalileoEphemeris
description: GALILEO Ephemeris describing satellite locations.  Definitions and usage are covered in OS SIS ICD, Issue 2.0, January 2021, Section 4.2, 4.3, and 5.1.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

navMsgType.description: nav_msg_type (enum): Enumerated field which describes the GALILEO message type used to define clock correction parameters.

clock.description: clock: GNSS broadcast parameters required to calculate sv clock corrections.

orbit.description: orbit: Keplerian orbit parameters required to calculate satellite position.

bgd.description: bgd: Broadcast group delay (E1-E5b if F/Nav, E1-E5b if I/NAV)  Units: s
